judge_reason: Description B provides extensive specific visual content (title, incident number, 26 fields with entries, specific dates and locations) that Description A completely omits, creating a major factual discrepancy in the visual content described.
original_image_tags: A typed checklist form on a dark background (likely a negative or aged document), punched with two holes on the left side for a binder. The top and bottom are stamped "RESTRICTED". At the bottom right corner, there are handwritten initials "SY". The text is in a typewriter font.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned black-and-white document page titled “CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS,” marked “RESTRICTED” at top and bottom, with two binder holes visible; the page lists Incident #125 and typed entries including date 2 May 1948, time Night, location St. Louis, Missouri with coordinates, and multiple checklist items such as number of objects One, color Phosphorescent after dark, shape Bird, and sketches or photographs None.*
